_comment: Five canonical recipes from Stellium's electional cookbook (examples 26-30), translated into the v2 DSL. These serve as few-shot exemplars for the recipe-generation prompt. When the schema changes, regenerate this file rather than hand-editing — the prompt depends on it being valid against the current schema.

recipes.rationale: For a new business launch, traditional electional astrology emphasizes (1) a waxing Moon for growth energy, (2) Moon not void of course so the venture takes root, (3) Mercury direct so contracts and communication go through cleanly, (4) no Moon-Saturn affliction to avoid early delays and obstacles, and (5) Jupiter in a strong house (1, 4, 7, 10, 11) for expansion and visibility.

Venus rules love and partnership; Moon-Venus harmony is the classic marker of relational well-being. Waxing Moon for growing affection, Venus direct so feelings are not under reconsideration, applying soft aspect from Moon to Venus, and avoiding Moon in difficult signs (Scorpio = jealousy, Capricorn = emotional distance) per traditional electional sources.

weighted_conditions.note: Venus in own/exaltation sign strengthens the love significator

recipes.intent: Mercury-ruled affairs: contracts, communication, short travel, learning
recipes.rationale: Mercury rules language, exchange, and short journeys. The cardinal requirement is Mercury direct — retrograde Mercury is the textbook hazard for signed agreements. Moon applying to Mercury endorses the matter; waxing Moon and not VoC for the action to take effect.

weighted_conditions.note: Mercury within 8.5° of Sun loses force

recipes.intent: Mars-ruled affairs: surgery, competition, physical action, confrontation
recipes.rationale: Mars governs initiative, action, sharp instruments, and physical force. Mars direct is required for follow-through; Mars in detriment (Cancer, Libra) weakens the significator. Avoid Moon-Mars hard aspects to prevent injury and over-reaction. Note: surgery traditionally uses waning Moon (less bleeding); competition uses waxing. The recipe below biases toward action; for procedures aiming to remove or reduce, override moon_waxing weight at request time.

weighted_conditions.note: Mars in own sign or exaltation

recipes.intent: Jupiter-ruled affairs: legal, education, publishing, long-distance travel, expansion
recipes.rationale: Jupiter rules growth, law, foreign affairs, higher learning, and luck. Jupiter direct so the matter expands rather than retracts; Moon applying soft aspect to Jupiter to seal the venture; waxing and not VoC for action to take. Jupiter dignified (Sagittarius, Pisces, Cancer) significantly amplifies the favorable signal.
